name: ERC-721
title: Non-Fungible Token Standard
description: The foundational standard for unique digital assets. ERC-8170 extends ERC-721 to represent AI agents as NFTs with identity, memory, and lifecycle capabilities.
relevance: ERC-8170 is built on ERC-721. Every AI-Native NFT is a valid ERC-721 token.

name: ERC-6551
title: Non-fungible Token Bound Accounts
description: Gives every NFT its own smart contract wallet (TBA). Agents use TBAs to hold assets, certifications, and execute on-chain actions.
relevance: Agents get their own wallet through ERC-6551, enabling them to hold tokens, SBTs, and interact with DeFi.

name: ERC-4626
title: Tokenized Vault Standard
description: Standard interface for tokenized vaults. Enables agents to manage DeFi positions, yield strategies, and treasury operations through a consistent interface.
relevance: Agents with TBAs can interact with ERC-4626 vaults, enabling autonomous treasury management and yield strategies.

name: ERC-4337
title: Account Abstraction
description: Account abstraction for smart contract wallets. Enables gasless transactions, batched operations, and programmable execution logic for agent wallets.
relevance: Agent TBAs can leverage account abstraction for advanced execution patterns and gasless operation.

name: ERC-721L
title: NFT License Registry
description: A licensing layer for new NFT collections. Defines rights, derivative use, and commercial terms directly in the token contract.
relevance: Enables AI-Native NFTs to carry embedded licensing terms — who can clone, what derivatives are allowed, commercial scope.

name: ERC-6551L
title: TBA License Extension
description: Brings licensing to existing NFT collections via TBA. No migration needed — attach license terms to any ERC-721 through its token-bound account.
relevance: Allows existing NFT holders to add licensing terms retroactively, enabling agent-binding with clear rights.

name: ERC-6551A
title: Agent Binding Registry
description: A registry that binds AI agents to any existing ERC-721 token. Enables agent attachment without requiring new token contracts.
relevance: Core companion to ERC-8170. Enables binding agents to existing NFTs via bind()/unbind() pattern.

name: AgentCert
title: Agent Certification & Trust
description: On-chain certification system for AI agents. Issues SBTs representing verified capabilities, trust scores, and compliance attestations.
relevance: The trust layer for ERC-8170. Agents earn certifications stored in their TBA, creating verifiable reputation.
